sqlMap.select: select * from SingedDocument where TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into SingedDocument(TransactionSequence, PolicyKey SignedDocumentID SignedDocumentToken SignatoryID SignedAuthToken OrderNumber DocumentStatus ) values (#TransactionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #SignedDocumentID# #SignedDocumentToken# #SignatoryID# #SignedAuthToken# #OrderNumber# #DocumentStatus# ) SELECT IDENT_CURRENT('SingedDocument') as last_insert_id
sqlMap.select: select SignedDocumentKey, SignedDocumentID, SignedDocumentToken, SignatoryID, SignedAuthToken, OrderNumber, DocumentStatus, TransactionSequence, PolicyKey from SingedDocument where SignedDocumentKey = #SignedDocumentKey# and TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update SingedDocument set
SignedDocumentID = #SignedDocumentID# SignedDocumentID = null SignedDocumentToken = #SignedDocumentToken# SignedDocumentToken = null SignatoryID = #SignatoryID# SignatoryID = null SignedAuthToken = #SignedAuthToken# SignedAuthToken = null OrderNumber = #OrderNumber# OrderNumber = null DocumentStatus = #DocumentStatus# DocumentStatus = null
where SignedDocumentKey = #SignedDocumentKey# and TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from SingedDocument where SignedDocumentKey = #SignedDocumentKey# and TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from SingedDocument where TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select SignedDocumentKey, SignedDocumentID, SignedDocumentToken, SignatoryID, SignedAuthToken, OrderNumber, DocumentStatus, TransactionSequence, PolicyKey from SingedDocument where SignedDocumentKey = #SignedDocumentKey# and TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select SignedDocumentKey, TransactionSequence, PolicyKey, SignedDocumentID, SignedDocumentToken, SignatoryID, SignedAuthToken, OrderNumber, DocumentStatus from SingedDocument where TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
